author: Ronald K Bett
description:
Defold Native Extension for DragonBones - 2D Skeleton animation software. Supports DragonBones Pro 5.5 runtimes. The Editor is old but really stable. Features of this extension includes:
 play and stop animations with blending
 get timeline events
 apply basic transformation such move, scale, resize and flip the character armature.
 show/hide image slots.
 transform bones, rotate and position.

Mesh based rendering with fast rendering. 1 draw call with Batch mode.
name: defDragon
